name: Three Tables
tagline: The easiest reef entry on the North Shore — walk right in from sand and float over a turtle-dotted reef.
parking: Shares free lot with Shark's Cove across the street
hours: Open 24 hours (no gates; Pupukea Beach Park)
bestTime: Summer (May–Sep) for calm conditions; morning for best visibility
talkStory: Named for three flat reef sections that poke above the water like tables. Much easier entry than Shark's Cove next door — sandy bottom instead of rocks. A better choice for less experienced snorkelers. Turtles are common over the reef. Summer only (dangerous in winter). Bring your own gear or rent in Haleiwa.
